message:
fix(writing): refine Barra factor labels and fix LiveRegression interval leak

Factor Label Visual Improvements (FactorHero component):
- Reposition floating factor labels for better spatial distribution:
  - MOMENTUM: [-45,10,0] → [-55,15,-10] (moved left and back)
  - VALUE: [45,-5,15] → [55,-5,20] (moved right and forward)
  - GROWTH: [0,20,-25] → [10,25,-30] (raised and shifted right)
  - SIZE: [-25,-15,35] → [-35,-20,45] (moved left, down, and forward)
  - Parent group raised from y=5 to y=10 for overall lift
- Increase factor label font size from 3.5 to 4 for better readability
- Add italic font style for visual distinction from other text
- Add text outline (width=0.2, color=#000000) for improved contrast
  against the dynamic 3D background
- Remove external Google Fonts URL dependency for the Inter font,
  allowing drei's Text component to use its default font handling

LiveRegression Memory Leak Fix:
- Add `intervalRef` using useRef to track the setInterval handle
- Clear any existing interval before starting new execution in runCode()
- Add useEffect cleanup function that clears interval on unmount
- This prevents orphaned intervals from continuing to run and update
  state after component unmount, which could cause React warnings
  about state updates on unmounted components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
